## Summary

Briefly describe the change and why it is needed.

## Related issue

Closes #(issue number) or references relevant discussion.

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Provider emulation change
- [ ] Documentation / runbook update
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] CI / tooling

## Quality gates

- [ ] `task quality` passes locally
- [ ] New or updated tests included where applicable
- [ ] `go vet ./...` clean
- [ ] `golangci-lint run` clean
- [ ] No new advisory size warnings introduced (or justified)

## Bug register (if fixing bugs)

| ID | Severity | Area | Summary | Regression Test | Status |
|----|----------|------|---------|-----------------|--------|
|    |          |      |         |                 |        |

## Checklist

- [ ] I have read `CONTRIBUTING.md` and `AGENTS.md`.
- [ ] My branch is up to date with `dev`.
- [ ] Commits are focused and logical; no debug `fmt.Println` left behind.
- [ ] I have not committed real `.muara/config.yml` files or secrets.
